
Length Compositions {data-navmenu="Fits to Data"}
=====================================

Row {.tabset}
-------------------------------------

### Time-Averaged Fits

```{r len_avg_grid}
len_fleets     <- unique(mv$len_comp_fits$fleet)
len_sexes      <- unique(mv$len_comp_fits$sex)
has_comp_stock <- "stock" %in% names(mv$len_comp_fits) &&
                  length(unique(mv$len_comp_fits$stock)) > 1L
len_stocks     <- if (has_comp_stock) unique(mv$len_comp_fits$stock) else NULL
fc <- mv_fleet_colours(fleet_names = len_fleets)

# One tagList item per fleet; nStock × nSex columns within each fleet row.
fleet_plots <- list()
for (fl in len_fleets) {
  col_panels <- list()
  for (stk in if (!is.null(len_stocks)) len_stocks else list(NULL)) {
    for (sx in len_sexes) {
      sub <- mv$len_comp_fits[
        mv$len_comp_fits$fleet == fl &
          mv$len_comp_fits$sex  == sx,
        , drop = FALSE
      ]
      if (!is.null(stk)) sub <- sub[sub$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE]

      panel_lbl <- if (!is.null(stk) && length(len_sexes) > 1L) {
        paste(stk, sx, sep = " - ")
      } else if (!is.null(stk)) {
        stk
      } else if (length(len_sexes) > 1L) {
        sx
      } else {
        fl
      }

      if (nrow(sub) == 0L) {
        p_e <- plot_ly()
        lay_e <- modelVis::mv_layout()
        lay_e$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label = panel_lbl))
        lay_e$barmode <- "overlay"
        col_panels[[length(col_panels) + 1L]] <- do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p_e), lay_e))
        next
      }

      avg_obs  <- tapply(X = sub$obs,  INDEX = sub$length, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
      avg_pred <- tapply(X = sub$pred, INDEX = sub$length, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
      avg_lens <- as.numeric(names(avg_obs))

      p <- plot_ly()
      p <- add_bars(p = p, x = avg_lens, y = as.numeric(avg_obs),
        marker = list(color = "rgba(180,180,180,0.6)",
                      line  = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)),
        showlegend = FALSE,
        hovertemplate = "Len %{x}: %{y:.4f}<extra>Obs</extra>")
      p <- add_lines(p = p, x = avg_lens, y = as.numeric(avg_pred),
        line = list(color = fc[fl], width = 1.5), showlegend = FALSE,
        hovertemplate = "Len %{x}: %{y:.4f}<extra>Pred</extra>")
      p <- add_markers(p = p, x = avg_lens, y = as.numeric(avg_pred),
        marker = list(color = fc[fl], size = 4,
                      line = list(color = "white", width = 0.5)),
        showlegend = FALSE, hoverinfo = "skip")
      lay <- modelVis::mv_layout()
      lay$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label = panel_lbl))
      lay$barmode     <- "overlay"
      p <- do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p), lay))
      col_panels[[length(col_panels) + 1L]] <- p
    }
  }
  if (length(col_panels) == 0L) next

  p_fleet <- if (length(col_panels) == 1L) {
    col_panels[[1L]]
  } else {
    do.call(subplot, c(col_panels, list(
      nrows = 1L, shareY = FALSE, titleX = FALSE, titleY = TRUE,
      margin = 0.04
    )))
  }
  p_fleet <- layout(p = p_fleet, title = fl,
    annotations = list(
      mv_bottom_label(label = "Length"),
      mv_left_label(label   = "Mean proportion")
    ))
  fleet_plots[[length(fleet_plots) + 1L]] <- modelVis::mv_config(p_fleet)
}

h_avg <- 300L
if (length(fleet_plots) == 1L) {
  fleet_plots[[1L]]
} else {
  htmltools::tagList(lapply(fleet_plots, function(p) {
    htmltools::div(style = paste0("height:", h_avg, "px; margin-bottom:10px;"), p)
  }))
}
```

### Residual Bubbles

```{r len_resid_bubble}
if (!is.null(mv$len_comp_resids)) {
  has_resid_stock <- "stock" %in% names(mv$len_comp_resids) &&
                     length(unique(mv$len_comp_resids$stock)) > 1L
  resid_stocks <- if (has_resid_stock) unique(mv$len_comp_resids$stock) else NULL
  # One item per fleet; stocks as columns within each fleet.
  fleet_resid_plots <- list()
  for (fl in len_fleets) {
    stk_panels <- list()
    for (stk in if (!is.null(resid_stocks)) resid_stocks else list(NULL)) {
      sub <- mv$len_comp_resids[mv$len_comp_resids$fleet == fl, , drop = FALSE]
      if (!is.null(stk)) sub <- sub[sub$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE]
      panel_lbl <- if (!is.null(stk)) stk else fl
      if (nrow(sub) == 0L) {
        p_e <- plot_ly()
        lay_e <- modelVis::mv_layout()
        lay_e$annotations <- list(mv_top_label(label = panel_lbl))
        stk_panels[[length(stk_panels) + 1L]] <- do.call(what = layout, args = c(list(p = p_e), lay_e))
        next
      }
      if (any(c("sex", "quarter") %in% names(sub))) {
        sub <- aggregate(residual ~ year + length,
                         data = sub, FUN = mean, na.rm = TRUE)
      }
      p <- mv_plot_bubble(df = sub, x_col = "year", y_col = "length",
                          title = panel_lbl)
      stk_panels[[length(stk_panels) + 1L]] <- p
    }
    if (length(stk_panels) == 0L) next
    p_fleet <- if (length(stk_panels) == 1L) {
      stk_panels[[1L]]
    } else {
      do.call(subplot, c(stk_panels, list(
        nrows = 1L, shareX = FALSE, shareY = TRUE,
        titleX = FALSE, titleY = TRUE, margin = 0.04
      )))
    }
    p_fleet <- layout(p = p_fleet, title = fl)
    fleet_resid_plots[[length(fleet_resid_plots) + 1L]] <- p_fleet
  }
  if (length(fleet_resid_plots) == 1L) {
    fleet_resid_plots[[1L]]
  } else {
    htmltools::tagList(lapply(fleet_resid_plots, function(p) {
      htmltools::div(style = "height:400px; margin-bottom:10px;", p)
    }))
  }
}
```

### Yearly Fits

```{r len_yearly_grid}
n_col_yr   <- 8L
lc_has_q   <- "quarter" %in% names(mv$len_comp_fits) &&
              length(unique(mv$len_comp_fits$quarter)) > 1L

# Selector widget + JS filter
.mk_sel <- function(id, lbl, opts) {
  opt_html <- paste0('<option value="', opts, '">', opts, '</option>',
                     collapse = "")
  htmltools::HTML(paste0(
    '<label style="margin-right:14px;font-size:13px;">', lbl,
    ' <select id="', id, '" onchange="filterLcYearly()"',
    ' style="margin-left:4px;font-size:13px;">',
    '<option value="">All</option>', opt_html, '</select></label>'
  ))
}
lc_filter_js <- htmltools::tags$script(htmltools::HTML(
  'function filterLcYearly() {
    var fl  = document.getElementById("lcy_fleet").value;
    var stk = document.getElementById("lcy_stock")
              ? document.getElementById("lcy_stock").value : "";
    var sx  = document.getElementById("lcy_sex").value;
    document.querySelectorAll(".lcy-plot").forEach(function(d) {
      var ok = (!fl  || d.dataset.fleet === fl) &&
               (!stk || d.dataset.stock === stk) &&
               (!sx  || d.dataset.sex   === sx);
      d.style.display = ok ? "block" : "none";
    });
  }'
))
selectors <- htmltools::tagList(
  .mk_sel("lcy_fleet", "Fleet:", len_fleets),
  if (!is.null(len_stocks)) .mk_sel("lcy_stock", "Stock:", len_stocks) else NULL,
  .mk_sel("lcy_sex",   "Sex:",   len_sexes)
)

# Build plots
plot_info <- list()
for (fl in len_fleets) {
  for (stk in if (!is.null(len_stocks)) len_stocks else list(NULL)) {
    for (sx in len_sexes) {
      sub <- mv$len_comp_fits[
        mv$len_comp_fits$fleet == fl &
          mv$len_comp_fits$sex == sx,
        , drop = FALSE
      ]
      if (!is.null(stk)) sub <- sub[sub$stock == stk, , drop = FALSE]
      if (nrow(sub) == 0) next

      lbl <- if (!is.null(stk) && length(len_sexes) > 1) {
        paste(fl, stk, sx, sep = " - ")
      } else if (!is.null(stk)) {
        paste(fl, stk, sep = " - ")
      } else if (length(len_sexes) > 1) {
        paste(fl, "-", sx)
      } else {
        fl
      }

      sub$year_q <- if (lc_has_q) paste0(sub$year, "-", sub$quarter) else
                      as.character(sub$year)

      # Per-fleet height: 122px per panel row + 90px overhead (matches
      # user-approved appearance of ~4 rows at 490px total).
      n_yrq_fl <- length(unique(sub$year_q))
      n_row_fl <- ceiling(n_yrq_fl / n_col_yr)
      h_fl     <- max(490L, 122L * n_row_fl + 90L)

      p <- mv_plot_comp_grid(
        df             = sub,
        bin_col        = "length",
        ylab           = "Proportion",
        ncol           = n_col_yr,
        years_per_page = Inf,
        year_col       = "year_q"
      )
      # Set explicit pixel height and turn off responsive so layout height wins
      p <- layout(p = p, title = lbl, margin = list(t = 50), height = h_fl)
      p <- plotly::config(p, responsive = FALSE,
                          displaylogo = FALSE,
                          modeBarButtonsToRemove = c("select2d","lasso2d","autoScale2d"))
      p$height <- h_fl
      plot_info[[length(plot_info) + 1L]] <- list(
        plot  = p,
        fleet = fl,
        stock = if (!is.null(stk)) stk else "",
        sex   = sx,
        h     = h_fl
      )
    }
  }
}

plot_divs <- lapply(plot_info, function(info) {
  htmltools::div(
    class         = "lcy-plot",
    `data-fleet`  = info$fleet,
    `data-stock`  = info$stock,
    `data-sex`    = info$sex,
    style         = paste0("height:", info$h, "px; margin-bottom:10px;"),
    info$plot
  )
})

htmltools::tagList(
  htmltools::div(style = "margin-bottom:8px;", selectors),
  lc_filter_js,
  do.call(htmltools::tagList, plot_divs)
)
```
